$comment: Harness config read by .claude/hooks/*.mjs. stopGate = CHEAP checks (seconds each — the gate runs on EVERY turn end); keep the expensive full gate in /validate. Empty array or missing file disarms the gate. stopGateTimeoutSec caps each command, stopGateTotalSec caps the whole gate (must stay under the Stop hook's outer timeout in settings.json). Commands are repo-owner-trusted, run with a shell in the project root. workTracking is set by /harness-init; backend none disables the layer. baseBranch (null = main/master) names a non-standard integration branch (develop/trunk) — guard protects it and /review//validate diff against it.
